{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ja teem waijadsfetu
Wehrfenn/ Aunu un Jehru par
Dedsamo. Uppurecin tam Dee-
wam no Debbes/ Kweefchu/
Gahls/ Wiuna un Etjes/ pehz to
Preesteru Stahstifchanas/ kas
Jerusalemē irr/ to buhs ikDeenas
winneem doht/ ka ne kahds
Truhkungs effus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ka tee tohs Uppurus par
faldu Smartchu tam Deewam
no Debbes uppure/ un luhs
preekſch ta Kehnixa un winna
Behrnu Dsihwofchanas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wehl tohp no manntim
paiwehlehts/ ka wits tas Zil-
veks/ kas scho Wahrdru pahr-
ahps/ no ta Namuna buhs wee-
nu Balki nemt un uszelt/ un
winnu pee ta pakahrt/ un winna
Namnam buhs tapehz tai Tee-
fai nodohtam un nopohstitam
tapt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tas Deews/ ka
Wahrdg tur mahjo/ lai nomaita
wiffus Kehnixus un Laudis/ kas
fawas Rohkas issteepj/ pretti
urredatnees un nomaitadami te
Deewa Nammu/ kas Jerusalemē
rr. Es Darijuſefinu to paweh-
ejs/ fo tikfutchi buhs darriht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Scho Darrija tikfutchi
Catnajus tas Semnes-Waldi-
ajs winnpufs Uppes/ un Star
Bosnajus ar fawu Draudsi/itt ka
as Rehnifsch Darijus bij fuhtijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un to Judu Wezzajee us-
taisija/ un tas Darbs labbi ts-
dewahs pehz to Praweeschu
Mahzibu/ ta Praweescha Aggu-
ius un Sakarijus Jodus Dehla/
un tee ustaifija un pabeidse to us
ta Israëta Deewa Pawehlescha-
nu/ un us Korejn/ Darijuſa un
Artasastus to Persexo Kehnixu
Pawehleschann.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un schis Nams tappe pa-
beigts us to treschu Deenu ta
Mehnes Adar/ tas bija tas fe-
staifs Gads ta Kehnixa Dari-
jusa Waldifchanas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee Israëta Behrni/
tee Preesteri un tee Lewiti/un tee
zitti aiswesti Behrni/ eeswehtija
scho Deewa Nammu ar Preeku.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un uppureja par scha Dee-
wa Namma Gefwehtifchanu
fints Wehrfchus/ divifints Au-
nus/ tfchetrfints Jehrus/ un di-
wipadesmits Ahſchus par Greh-
fu-Uppuri preekſch winnu Israë-
lu/ pehz to Israëta Zilfchu
Pulka.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee eezeble tohs Pree-
sterus fawā Kahrtā/ un tohs Le-
witus fawā Kahrtā / par fawa
Deewa Kalposchanu/ kas Jeru-
salemē irr/ ittin ka rakstihts
stahw Mohsus Grahmata.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tee aiswesti Behrni tur-
reja arri tohs Paſfa-Swehtkus,
zettorta padesmitā Deena ta pir-
ma Mehnes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo tee Preesteri nn tee
Lewiti bij fchykibstifschees/ itt ka
weens weenigajs Wihrs/ wiſti
Yyyyy 3
btja
"
    }
  ],
